appversion_lifecycle.description: Details the lifecycle settings for application versions, including whether to delete the source from S3, maximum age in days, maximum count, and the service role.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) uniquely identifying the Elastic Beanstalk application.

description.description: A brief explanation or summary of the Elastic Beanstalk application.

id.description: The unique identifier for the Elastic Beanstalk application.
